entity.Name: Account

Description.description: Type an ID number or code for the account to quickly search and identify the account in system views.
Tapez un numéro d'identification pour le compte pour le rechercher et l'identifier dans les vues système.
Geben Sie eine ID-Nummer oder einen ID-Code für die Firma ein, um es in Systemansichten schnell suchen und erkennen zu können.

Establishment Date

Shows whether the appointment is open, completed, or canceled. Completed and canceled appointments are read-only and can't be edited.

Gibt Aufschluss über den Status des Termins (offen, abgeschlossen oder storniert). Abgeschlossene und stornierte Termine sind schreibgeschützt und können nicht bearbeitet werden.

Type the primary email address for the contact.
Tapez l'adresse de messagerie principale pour le contact.
Geben Sie die primäre E-Mail-Adresse für den Kontakt ein.
संपर्क के लिए प्राथमिक ईमेल पता लिखें.
Type the contact's first name to make sure the contact is addressed correctly in sales calls, email, and marketing campaigns.
Tapez le prénom du contact pour vous assurer que le contact est mentionné correctement dans les appels de télévente, le courrier électronique et les campagnes marketing.
Geben Sie den Vornamen des Kontakts ein, um sicherzustellen, dass in Verkaufsanrufen, E-Mails und Marketingkampagnen die korrekte Anrede verwendet wird.
यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए कि विक्रय कॉल, ईमेल और मार्केटिंग अभियानों में संपर्क को सही संबोधित किया जाए, संपर्क का प्रथम नाम लिखें.
Combines and shows the contact's first and last names so that the full name can be displayed in views and reports.
Combine et affiche le nom et le prénom du contact pour que le nom complet puisse être affiché dans les vues et les rapports.
Kombiniert und zeigt den Vor- und Nachnamen des Kontakts, sodass in Ansichten und Berichten der vollständige Name angezeigt werden kann.
संपर्क के प्रथम नाम और अंतिम नाम को संयोजित करता है और दिखाता है ताकि दृश्यों और रिपोर्ट्स में पूरा नाम प्रदर्शित किया जा सके.
Type the contact's last name to make sure the contact is addressed correctly in sales calls, email, and marketing campaigns.
Tapez le nom du contact pour vous assurer que le contact est mentionné correctement dans les appels de télévente, le courrier électronique et les campagnes marketing.
Geben Sie den Nachnamen des Kontakts ein, um sicherzustellen, dass in Verkaufsanrufen, E-Mails und Marketingkampagnen die korrekte Anrede verwendet wird.
यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए कि विक्रय कॉल, ईमेल और मार्केटिंग अभियानों में संपर्क को सही संबोधित किया जाए, संपर्क का अंतिम नाम लिखें.
Type the contact's middle name or initial to make sure the contact is addressed correctly.
Tapez le deuxième prénom ou l'initiale du contact pour vous assurer que le contact est mentionné correctement.
Geben Sie den zweiten Vornamen oder das Initial des Kontakts ein, um sicherzustellen, dass die korrekte Anrede verwendet wird.
यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए कि संपर्क को सही से संबोधित किया जाए, संपर्क का मध्य नाम या आद्याक्षर लिखें.
Type the mobile phone number for the contact.
Tapez le numéro de téléphone mobile du contact.
Geben Sie die Mobiltelefonnummer für den Kontakt ein.
संपर्क का मोबाइल नंबर लिखें.
Select the parent account or parent contact for the contact to provide a quick link to additional details, such as financial information, activities, and opportunities.
Sélectionnez le compte parent ou le contact parent du contact pour fournir un lien rapide vers les détails supplémentaires, comme les informations financières, les activités et les opportunités.

Wählen Sie die übergeordnete Firma oder den übergeordneten Kontakt für den Kontakt aus, um eine direkte Verknüpfung mit zusätzlichen Details wie Finanzinformationen, Aktivitäten und Verkaufschancen bereitzustellen.
अतिरिक्त विवरण, जैसे वित्तीय जानकारी, गतिविधियाँ और अवसर, के लिए त्वरित लिंक प्रदान करने हेतु संपर्क का पैरेंट खाता या पैरेंट संपर्क चुनें.

Status des Kontakts.
संपर्क की स्थिति.
Shows whether the contact is active or inactive. Inactive contacts are read-only and can't be edited unless they are reactivated.
Indique si le contact est actif ou inactif. Les contacts inactifs sont en lecture seule et ne peuvent pas être modifiés avant d'être réactivés.
Zeigt, ob der Kontakt aktiv oder inaktiv ist. Inaktive Kontakte sind schreibgeschützt und können erst nach ihrer Reaktivierung bearbeitet werden.
दिखाता है कि संपर्क सक्रिय है या निष्क्रिय है. निष्क्रिय संपर्क केवल-पढ़ने के लिए होते हैं और जबतक कि उन्हें पुनः सक्रिय न किया जाए उन्हें संपादित नहीं किया जा सकता.

Geben Sie die Haupttelefonnummer für diesen Kontakt ein.

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0" ?><xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"><xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /><xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[We haven't heard from you...]]></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.body:
Dear ]]>Valued Customer

We have not heard from you for a while. We wanted to check in and make sure that you are still having a great experience using our product(s). We have asked ]]>a customer service representative

Thank you.

]]>
emailtemplate.title: Account Reconnect
emailtemplate.description: Use this template to reopen the lines of communication with a customer you have not been in contact with for a while.

emailtemplate.title: Duplicate Detection Task Completion Template
emailtemplate.description: Use this e-mail template for sending notification to system users on successful completion of duplicate detection task.

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0"?><xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"><xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /><xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[Microsoft Dynamics CRM: ]]><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="asyncoperation/name"><xsl:value-of select="asyncoperation/name" /></xsl:when><xsl:otherwise>Import</xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose><![CDATA[ is complete]]></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.body:
This Microsoft Dynamics CRM import completed successfully

Name: ]]>

Started: ]]>

View your import in Microsoft Dynamics CRM.

For help resolving failures, open Microsoft CRM Help.

If the links do not open, paste the following links into Internet Explorer:

Import: https://org45a09ef5.crm5.dynamics.com/import/edit.aspx?id=]]>

Help resolving failures:]]>
emailtemplate.title: Import Data Task Completion Template
emailtemplate.description: Use this e-mail template for sending notification to system users on successful completion of Import task.

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0"?><xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"><xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /><xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[Microsoft Dynamics CRM: Import ]]><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="asyncoperation/name"><xsl:value-of select="asyncoperation/name" /></xsl:when><xsl:otherwise>Import</xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose><![CDATA[ failed.]]></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.body:
Microsoft Dynamics CRM :Import ]]>

Name: ]]>

Started: ]]>

View your import in Microsoft Dynamics CRM.

If the link does not open, paste the following link into Internet Explorer:

Import: https://org45a09ef5.crm5.dynamics.com/import/edit.aspx?id=]]>

For information about how to resolve failures, in Microsoft Dynamics CRM, on the Help menu, click Troubleshooting, and then click Importing records - troubleshooting.]]>
emailtemplate.title: Import Data Task Failure Template
emailtemplate.description: Use this e-mail template for sending notification to system users on failure of Import task.

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0" ?><xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"><xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /><xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[You have been unsubscribed...]]></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.body:
Dear Customer,

As per your request, we have unsubscribed you from receiving marketing related communication from us.

Please call us at ]]>UserPhone

Thanks

]]>
emailtemplate.title: Marketing communication unsubscribe acknowledgement
emailtemplate.description: Use this e-mail template for sending acknowledgement to customers during auto unsubscribe.

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0" ?><xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"><xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /><xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[Upcoming industry event]]></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.body:
Dear ]]>Valued Customer

We are excited to inform you that our company will be attending the Industry Expo in ]]>a city near you

We look forward to seeing you there.

Thank you.

]]>
emailtemplate.title: Marketing Event Notification
emailtemplate.description: Use this template to notify your customers of an upcoming trade show or event that your organization or business unit will be attending.

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0"?> <xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"> <xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /> <xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[Microsoft Dynamics CRM: ]]> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="asyncoperation/name"> <xsl:value-of select="asyncoperation/name" /> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise>Duplicate Detection task</xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose><![CDATA[ is complete]]> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.subjectpresentationxml: <template> <text><![CDATA[Microsoft Dynamics CRM: ]]></text> <slugs> <slug> <entity>asyncoperation</entity> <attribute>name</attribute> </slug> <default>Duplicate Detection task</default> </slugs> <text><![CDATA[ is complete]]></text> </template>
emailtemplate.body:
This Microsoft Dynamics CRM duplication-detection task completed successfully.

Name: ]]> [Duplicate Detection task]

Started: ]]>

To view and manage duplicates, do one of the following:

Click https://org45a09ef5.crm5.dynamics.com/main.aspx?pagetype=entityrecord&etn=asyncoperation&formid=e0166470-55ac-4793-b4ef-e86c956ead83&id=]]>

or

Log on to Microsoft Dynamics CRM and navigate to Duplicate Detection page and double-click the name of the task.

]]>
emailtemplate.title: Modern Duplicate Detection Task Completion Template

emailtemplate.subject: <?xml version="1.0" ?><xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" version="1.0"><xsl:output method="text" indent="no" /><xsl:template match="/data"><![CDATA[Thank you for registering with us]]></xsl:template></xsl:stylesheet>
emailtemplate.body:
Dear ]]>Valued Customer

Thank you for registering with us. We now have the following registration information on file:

Name: ]]>Street Address: ]]>No Address ProvidedCity: ]]>State or Province: ]]>Country or Region: ]]>Postal Code: ]]>E-mail Address: ]]>

If you would like to change or add additional information to your customer profile please visit our Web site. While there you can take advantage of the many self-service features of our site including scheduling, appointment notifications, knowledge base look-up, and service request management.

We look forward to serving you in the future.

Thank you.

]]>
emailtemplate.title: Thank you for registering with us
